n,x=-67311-(-67312),W[116860+-116859]while x do Q[x],n=Q[x]-(732919+-732918),n+(-529571+529572)if 112919-112919==Q[x]then Q[x],E[x]=nil,nil end x=W[n]end end,{},function(W,n)local u=T(n)local
